description: Synthetic SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 HL7 v2.5 OUL^R22 QC upload over MLLP with SPM-11=Q.

source.reference: synthetic seed from SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 LIS driver knowledgebase section 7 / X3 IFU App. B section 1.3 (LIS-176)
source.note: Application payload only; MllpTransport applies VT/FS/CR framing at replay. Synthetic, not bench-captured. SPM-11=Q is the LIS-176 QC-routing discriminator; live confirmation remains a LIS-75 bench item.

terminology.note: Minimal synthetic MAGLUMI X3 HL7 QC seed for LIS-176. Real QC lot/level vocabulary graduates with LIS-75/LIS-33.
